After 3 visits we were totally disappointed with our visit tonight. Previously we had a lovely barman who was chatty and advisory on beers. Tonight we got a tall bloke who was more Interested in taking our card as deposit for drinks than making any human connection. Made us nervous handing over card and to be honest on 3 previous visits and big spends we won't be back.

Atmosphere is good, beer selection is okay, staff behind the bar the night I was there was terrible.  Got my order wrong, and never followed up with me, had to get my own silverware from an unused table ( she watched me get it)…no apologies.  Too busy talking to do her job.

We never tried the food as we never realised how early the restaurant closed and they had stopped taking orders when we were ready to eat.  However, we did try the beer flights, which gives a 5oz  glass of four selections from the beer menu, although some beers are not part of the deal.

I tried a mix of a Pumpkin spice lager,  an amber alert, a blonde ale and an IPA.  Although all the beers were a higher abv than current normal UK ales they all lacked  flavour, with the only one having any discernable taste was the Pumpkin spice lager and this was only because the rim of the glass had been dipped in some flavouring mix.
